title: Leaves and Absences: Family and Medical Leave
description: Conroe ISD provides eligible employees with unpaid, job-protected leave for serious health conditions, the birth or adoption of a child, or to care for a qualifying family member. The district follows federal Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) guidelines to ensure employees can attend to important personal and family needs without risking their jobs. Understanding this policy helps families and community members know what support is available to the staff members who serve students every day.
